claim_boundary: Client Phase 5 creates a delivery package scaffold only. It does not create legal advice, financial advice, binding contract terms, compliance certification, production monitoring, truth validation, confirmed findings, or autonomous client action.

executive_summary.purpose: Provide a bounded delivery structure for client review artifacts, candidate-discrepancy memo scaffolds, limitations, and next-step options.
executive_summary.safe_summary: This package organizes review materials for human adjudication. It does not assert findings, validate truth, certify compliance, monitor production, or authorize client action.

limitations: This scaffold does not evaluate live production systems.
This scaffold does not validate source content truth.
This scaffold does not certify legal, financial, medical, compliance, or security conclusions.
This scaffold does not replace client human review.
This scaffold does not authorize autonomous action.
This scaffold does not include protected implementation details.
This scaffold does not create a free pilot or unpaid evaluation commitment.

methods_boundary.allowed_method_claim: The package organizes observable artifacts, provenance references, review questions, candidate-discrepancy memo scaffolds, and limitations for human review.

next_step_options.description: Client or reviewer examines review packets and candidate-discrepancy memo scaffolds.
Ask client for one bounded additional artifact or clarification.
Park the workflow if artifacts are insufficient or boundaries are unclear.
Discuss a paid pilot only with written scope, acceptance criteria, boundaries, and payment terms.
Engage CPA/legal support before proceeding alone.

professional_support_threshold.note: This is a professional-support threshold, not legal advice.
professional_support_threshold.required_action: Engage CPA/legal support before proceeding alone.
professional_support_threshold.trigger: If procurement, paid pilot, contract terms, budget, or money movement becomes real.
